title: lupulus scandens
intro: Lupulus scandens, also known as the Himalayan hop, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Cannabaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lupulus scandens include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Lupulus scandens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
